author: w3Lb
content: WHY: README invites contributions but there's no CONTRIBUTING.md, no issue templates, no PR template — table stakes for the project maturity tier being targeted. SCOPE: (1) CONTRIBUTING.md: dev setup (MSRV 1.93, cargo test --workspace, clippy -D warnings, fmt), the workspace crate map, how to run fuzz targets and benches, DCO/licensing note matching the dual MIT/Apache-2.0 + the existing contribution clause in README. (2) .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/: bug report (ripsed --version, OS, minimal reproduction, expected vs actual), feature request; config.yml disabling blank issues optional. (3) PR template: checklist (tests added, CHANGELOG entry, clippy/fmt clean). Small, one sitting.
